note: Optional submodule of entityreference_filter that extends the curated reference-view-driven Views filter to Search API index fields. It only adds the plugin `entityreference_filter_view_result_search_api` (subclass of the parent filter + SearchApiFilterTrait). Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: I use the Views Reference Filter module and want its curated, reference-view-driven exposed filter to work on a Search API index view. What do I need to enable?
evals.expected_output: Enable the entityreference_filter_search_api submodule (it requires both entityreference_filter and search_api). Once enabled, hook_views_data_alter() attaches the reference filter to Search-API-indexed entity-id / entity-reference fields; without it those Search API fields are skipped.

evals.prompt: What is the Views filter plugin id the Search API integration of Views Reference Filter provides, and what class/trait implements it?
evals.expected_output: Plugin id entityreference_filter_view_result_search_api, class EntityReferenceFilterViewResultSearchApi which extends the parent EntityReferenceFilterViewResult and uses core Search API's SearchApiFilterTrait. Its config schema inherits views.filter.entityreference_filter_view_result.

evals.prompt: What are the module dependencies of entityreference_filter_search_api, and does it add any admin UI, permissions, or Drush commands?
evals.expected_output: It depends on entityreference_filter:entityreference_filter and search_api:search_api. It has no configuration route (configure is null) and adds no permissions, routes, services, or Drush commands — it only registers the Search API filter plugin variant.
